name: Satellarknight Zefrathuban
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜星因士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イーサテラナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セフィラツバーン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "tellarknight" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal, Flip, or Pendulum Summoned: You can target 1 other "tellarknight" or "Zefra" card in your Monster Zone or Pendulum Zone, and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use this effect of "Satellarknight Zefrathuban" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "tellarknight" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal, Flip, or Pendulum Summoned: You can target 1 other "tellarknight" or "Zefra" card in your Monster Zone or Pendulum Zone, and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use this effect of "Satellarknight Zefrathuban" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal, Flip, or Pendulum Summoned: You can target 1 other "tellarknight" or "Zefra" card in your Monster Zone or Pendulum Zone, and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy them. You can only use this effect of "Satellarknight Zefrathuban" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
